description:
iso.me uses GPS to track your location visits and movement paths — all stored privately on your device.

Features:
• Automatic visit detection with place names and addresses
• High-accuracy GPS tracking with path recording
• Live Activity showing real-time tracking on your Lock Screen
• Interactive map with visit markers, travel paths, and date filtering
• Export your data in JSON, CSV, or Markdown format
• Import previously exported data
• Apple Watch companion app
• Free to use; unlock data export with a one-time purchase

Great for privacy-minded geolocation history, travel journals, routes, trips, every journey, hikes, walks, and commutes.

Your data never leaves your device. No accounts, no servers, no tracking of you.
whatsNew: This update improves import reliability for files that include location points, so your full-resolution history stays in sync after importing data.
promotionalText: Summer's here — let iso.me track your road trips, beach days, and adventures privately on-device. No accounts, no servers, no compromises. Capture your summer.
